title: [Let's Do] Furniture
description: Let's expand your world with a whole set of new and exciting furnitures! All in the style of the Let's Do Mods.
body:
![Furniture](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/furniture.png)

Colorful Curtains & Elegant Embellishments

The mod that does furniture differently!


"Spice up life, add a flourish"


Furniture adds a boatload of new furniture items, some you've seen before in other furniture mods, and some you've never seen before. Polish, style, and dress your home the way *you* want.
Make your house a home. Leave your comfort zone.
Furniture is a mod that came along with Satisfyl's desire for intricate decor, something that does more than look pretty and it serves to liven up your home by adding a variety of functional or interesting decorative elements.
## All the Colors
- Stylish curtains available in all 16 colors - Clocks, mirrors, and furniture sets available in all vanilla woodtypes - Sofas, pouffes, and lamps available in all 16 colors
Just a little to the left honey. No, my left, not your left!
## Modular Furniture
- Connect dressers of any woodtype to a desk of any woodtype to create your own personalized desk - Increase the length of your lamps from a tiny desk lamp to a tall standing lamp - Cover your windows with shutters of any length
There's so much diversity, it's almost like we're at an IKEA!
## Other Decorative Elements
- Differently styled crafting stations that fit in just a little more compared to your original crafting table - Terrarium for some miniature greenery in your home - Displays to show off your most prized possessions - An aquarium capable of housing pufferfish, cod, or salmon - A ship in a bottle to make you feel like you're out at sea - A grammophone that can play your favorite music discs on repeat - A trashcan to dispose of any unwanted friends... I mean, items. Definitely items. Also remember that one man's trash is another man's treasure

Don't read the manual.

Put it together your way.

Read the manual anyways.


Dedicated to MissLilitu


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.
